revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-455

A vertical antenna capacitively loaded at its upper end. The loading is often achieved by the attachment of wires or of a metal plate to the top of the antenna.

{{IALAFooter}}
